description_long: This is a shirtless adult male with a muscular build, covered in numerous tattoos across his chest, arms, and back. He has a distinctive, voluminous hairstyle swept to one side and wears a large, chunky necklace. His lower body is dressed in casual, loose-fitting shorts that reach just above the knee, and he wears mismatched leg coverings—one leg is fully covered while the other is bare. He is wearing modern athletic sneakers and has a confident, relaxed stance. The overall appearance suggests a streetwise, urban style with a focus on body art and bold accessories.
description: Tattooed, shirtless adult male with a bold hairstyle, chunky necklace, casual shorts, and athletic sneakers, exuding urban street style.
description_view_0: Front view showing tattoos on chest and arms, necklace, facial features, and full outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hairstyle's volume, arm tattoos, and the asymmetrical leg covering.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying back tattoos, hairstyle from behind, and the fit of the shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing arm tattoos, necklace profile, and the stance of the legs.
attribute_clothing_type: casual shorts with asymmetrical leg covering and a large necklace
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length voluminous hair swept to one side
